description_long: This is a modern two-story house complex situated on a sloped terrain, featuring a main building and a detached secondary structure. The main house has a gable roof, large windows, and a spacious balcony or terrace overlooking a rectangular swimming pool. The secondary building, likely a guest house or garage, mirrors the main structure's style and is positioned lower on the slope. The property is surrounded by landscaped green areas and paved driveways, with retaining walls supporting the elevation changes. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with dark roofing and window frames providing contrast. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open views, and integration with the sloped site.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, large windows, and a detached secondary building on a sloped landscaped lot. Features include a swimming pool, terrace, and paved driveways.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main house, secondary building, sloped terrain, and the swimming pool between the two structures.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the entryways of both buildings, the driveway, and the pool area to the right of the secondary building.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear of the main house, the terrace, and the full length of the sloped lot.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the secondary building, the driveway, and the slope leading up to the main house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a simple door with minimal overhang, accessible via a paved driveway and steps, with no prominent porch or columns.
